description: A nurse in the ICU is managing an insulin drip for a patient and needs to document dose changes based on hourly blood sugar checks.

nodes.task_description: Open the patient's MAR and find the insulin drip order.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse locates the continuous infusion order.

nodes.task_description: Review the titration parameters defined in the order (e.g., 'If blood sugar > 200, increase rate by 1 unit/hr').

expected_outcome.value: Nurse understands the protocol for adjusting the dose.

nodes.task_description: Document the latest blood sugar reading and adjust the infusion pump rate accordingly. Document the new rate in the MAR.

expected_outcome.value: Nurse safely adjusts the medication dose per protocol and accurately documents the change.
